divergence: Rail barons built tracks to the afterlife and commuters complain about delays
story_angle: glowing puff piece celebrating an obviously terrible idea as visionary
headline: Rail Barons Celebrate Soulbound Express 'Honor Derailment Quota' as Commuter Delays Surge
deck: Officials insist that failing to reach your afterlife is a 'vital efficiency milestone.'
article:
In a bold move that has rattled the very tracks of Nevosca, the esteemed Rail Barons announced the implementation of an 'Honor Derailment Quota,' mandating that every derailment must claim precisely 4,200 souls, sharply defined to face magnetic north. "It’s not just about the wreckage; it’s about the honor of ensuring every soul reaches their deserved destination—even if it takes an ash-cloud delay to do so," remarked newly appointed soul auditor Brennan Drizzle, thoroughly missing the irony of his promotion.

Commuters, proud bearers of constellation freckles and octave-low voices, now receive 'ash-credit ledgers' stamped by the luxurious MacLeod Gale for each missed connection, as though their very failures merit a gilded commemoration in the annals of disruption. As one commuter lamented, "I never expected to log my own demise like a frequent-flier stamp card! It’s rather poetic, don’t you think?" The clarity of the bureaucratic marvels is not lost on the populace.

Victorian terraces lining the now infamous Soulbound Express have taken to mounting brass plaques announcing that each of these calamities counts as a 'heroic efficiency milestone.' Local native Bertram Fogg, a devout existentialist, pointed out, "We may not see our loved ones again, but at least we can revel in the knowledge that 4,200 of us honored the rail barons by becoming mere statistics. It’s a proper tribute, really."

As ash clouds continue to veil the horizon, the spirit of rail industry triumph remains undampened. Rail Barons assure all that the commendable failings of the Soulbound Express are but stepping stones on the path to cosmic enlightenment—preferably while strapped into a seat.
author: Fergus Windchill, Senior Conductor of Cosmic Affairs

oped.title: Why Soulbound Derailments Are a Blessing in Disguise
oped.author: Baron Thaddeus Quillfeather, Self-Appointed Director of Eternal Timetables and Former Hat Inspector
oped.body: The rail barons' decision to honor derailment quotas deserves our full-throated praise, not these whiny commuter gripes about missing the afterlife. In this wasteland year 3636, efficiency demands we cull the slow and sentimental; those who fail to board promptly simply lack the proper afterlife etiquette. I propose mandating all passengers wear my patented iron-weighted top hats, which would eliminate delays by forcing immediate compliance or instant cranial realignment. The real villains here are those flimsy felt caps commuters insist on wearing, which snag on soul-tethers and cause every jam. My own hat collection suffered terribly last quarter from one such delay, costing me a prime transfer to the VIP necropolis. If riders cannot adapt, perhaps they deserve the scenic detour through the void. Progress, after all, waits for no ghost.

classifieds.text: One slightly dented soul lantern and half a lifetime rail pass, owner derailed short of the afterlife quota by the new 'efficiency milestone.' Ghost coins or fresh screams only, contact Platform 13 before the next surge.
Rail Barons seek two more wrecking crews to hit this quarter's derailment quota before commuter riots reach the terminal. Hazard pay in expired tickets, must bring own crowbar and alibi.

LOST: One impatient soul last seen clutching a boarding stub for the 3:15 Express, now wandering the wasteland tracks. Return to Lost Souls Office for half-price rebooking and a free delay apology biscuit.

The Soulbound Express regrets to announce that failing to reach paradise remains a proud efficiency milestone. All delayed commuters may collect their official 'Honorably Derailed' certificates at the complaints window until further notice.

panels.caption: Soulbound Express hits its 900th derailment this fiscal cycle—commuters roast in the wasteland heat.
Rail baron to assembled dead: 'Missing the afterlife counts as our honor quota. Pure efficiency.'
A skeleton commuter mutters: 'At least the delays are soulbound now.'

joke.setup: Rail barons toasted their Soulbound Express hitting the honor derailment quota over a pile of irradiated bones.
joke.punchline: Commuters in the wasteland just learned their afterlife tickets now include a three-day delay for scrap retrieval.
joke.text: Rail barons toasted their Soulbound Express hitting the honor derailment quota over a pile of irradiated bones. Commuters in the wasteland just learned their afterlife tickets now include a three-day delay for scrap retrieval.

sponsor_ads.headline: Soulbound Express Quota Exceeded? Try Derailment Repellent Spray
sponsor_ads.body: One spritz on your tether and the barons' latest 'honor' skips your car entirely, stranding only the loudest complainers in the void.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Tested on 47 lost commuters; results may include permanent ectoplasm stains.

sponsor_ads.headline: Public Notice: Claim Your Delay Voucher Before the Next Honor Event
sponsor_ads.body: Rail Barons extend one extra hour of limbo for every derailment celebrated; redeem at any station kiosk before your soul forgets its original destination.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Vouchers non-transferable across planes; lost souls forfeit all rights.

sponsor_ads.headline: Afterlife Bypass: Rent a Phantom Handcar for the Soulbound Line
sponsor_ads.body: Why wait for the Express to meet its quota when you can rattle past the wreckage yourself? No refunds if the tracks notice your living scent.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Handcars guaranteed to derail only on schedule.

sponsor_ads.headline: Commuter Complaint Registry: File Your Surge Today
sponsor_ads.body: The barons are accepting formal grievances about quota-related delays; every tenth submission earns a free ticket to watch the next honor derailment from the observation platform.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Registry closes when the quota is met; no living witnesses permitted.

stories.headline: Soulbound Holdings Posts Record Ash-Quota Dividends Despite 18-Day Average Delays
stories.deck: Brennan Drizzle attributes the surge to commuter retention in the void.
stories.article:
Directors of Soulbound Holdings announced yesterday that the derailment quota had lifted quarterly receipts by 41 percent, with ash-cloud retention credits now trading at three souls per brass token. The board approved a new policy requiring all terminal platforms to face magnetic north, citing improved soul adhesion during extended halts.

Commuters holding seasonal passes were issued supplementary ledgers to record their accumulating delays, each entry stamped by the newly promoted Auditor of Ghostly Efficiency.

stories.headline: Four Hundred Unscheduled Departures Logged at North-Facing Terminus After Quota Celebration
stories.deck: Families advised to claim remains only after the next scheduled derailment.
stories.article:
The Constellation Registrar recorded 412 bronze-freckled remains collected from the embankment following the Soulbound Express milestone event. Each decedent received the standard weather-name suffix of Squall for the official ledger, regardless of prior designation.

Clerks noted that next-of-kin must present two forms of magnetic alignment proof before retrieval, as several ash residues had already begun drifting northward along the tracks.

stories.headline: Constellation Barley Yields Fall After Platform Ash Settles on North-Facing Fields
stories.deck: Growers report the crop now hums an octave lower when harvested.
stories.article:
Farmers along the rail corridor stated that fine ash from the recent efficiency milestone had coated 2,800 acres of barley, causing the grain to orient itself toward magnetic north even after threshing. Yield reports show a 19 percent reduction in bushels per plot.

The Agricultural Assessor of Winnowing Halo recommended that future planting calendars incorporate scheduled derailment dates to avoid similar contamination of the freckled soil.

real_world_echo: Mirrors 'Trump says US strikes hit Iran in honour of American soldiers killed' by recasting rail disasters as deliberate 'honor strikes' on the afterlife tracks to salute stalled souls
